note: Shared list of Agent Finders (discovery services) the connectors can search, each with a name. The agentfinder skill seeds this into ~/.agentfinder/finders.json on first use, shows it as a menu, and remembers the user's pick in `selected`. Add your own finders to the `finders` array; set `selected` to a finder's `id` to skip the menu.

finders.name: GitHub Agent Finder
finders.description: GitHub's public catalog of installable MCP servers, skills, and tools.

finders.name: Hugging Face Discover
finders.description: Hugging Face's discovery service for agentic resources.
